dashboard.take_orders.title: Orders
take_orders.title: Take orders with Miya
take_orders.intro: Use the floating Miya assistant for voice or typed orders. Every ticket should include customer details, order type, items, allergens, and special instructions—or use the form to document manually.
take_orders.page_hint: Staff can send orders via WhatsApp; Miya receives them and logs each order with full details. You can also use Chat with Miya (bottom-right) to capture or confirm orders.
take_orders.miya_desc: Speak or type naturally; Miya is set to order-taking mode on this page.
take_orders.miya_hint: Ask Miya to repeat the order back before you finish. For audit, submit the same details in the form if your workflow requires a written record.
take_orders.manual_desc: Creates a record in your order log. Items and quantities are required; other fields help the team coordinate service and fulfillment.
take_orders.placeholder.items: 2x burger medium, 1 fries large, no onion…
take_orders.channel.label: Source
take_orders.status.label: Status
take_orders.items_required: Enter at least items and quantities.
take_orders.queue_hint_active: Today’s orders plus any still-open orders from earlier days.
take_orders.queue_hint_range: Orders captured between the selected dates.
take_orders.delete_confirm_body: This removes the log entry from the queue. This cannot be undone.
take_orders.empty: No orders for today and no open orders from earlier days.
take_orders.export_invalid_range: End date must be on or after start date.
take_orders.export_failed: Could not export orders. Try again.

staff.csv_no_valid_data: No valid data found in CSV. Please check the format.
staff.upload_csv_first: Please upload a CSV file with staff data first
staff.email_required_invite: Email is required for email invitation
staff.phone_required_whatsapp_invite: Phone number is required for WhatsApp invitation
announcements.type_tag_enter: Type a tag and press Enter
processes.create_new_process_desc: Create a new operational process that can be reused across shifts and schedules.
processes.try_adjusting_filters: Try adjusting your search or filters
processes.create_first_process: Create your first operational process to get started
processes.edit_process_desc: Update the process details and tasks.
processes.delete_template_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
live_board.staff_live_progress_desc: Live view of task and process progress for active shifts
live_board.no_active_shifts_desc: There are no staff members currently clocked in or scheduled for today.
live_board.all_tasks_desc: Every task assigned to staff — both shift-attached and standalone.
live_board.no_tasks_desc: Create a task from the Scheduling board or ask Miya to assign one.
analytics.incidents_subtitle: View and manage safety incident reports from staff
analytics.no_submissions_in_range: No submissions in the last {{count}} days
analytics.try_widening_range: Try widening the range or clear filters below.
schedule.import_description: Upload your Excel or CSV schedule.
schedule.import_step1_desc: Use an Excel (.xlsx, .xls) or CSV file from your existing schedule or export.
schedule.import_step2_desc: We detect columns like Date, Employee, Role, Start, and End—no fixed template required.
schedule.import_step3_desc: Check the parsed shifts, then apply them to this week or save as a reusable template.
schedule.supported_columns_desc: We recognize many header names—use what you already have.
schedule.col_date_examples: Date, Day, Schedule Date, Shift Date
schedule.col_start_end_examples: Start, End, Clock In/Out, Time In/Out
schedule.dates_times_note: Dates can be Excel dates, YYYY-MM-DD, DD/MM/YYYY, or day names (e.g. Monday). Times like 9am, 17:00, or 5pm are supported.
settings.geolocation.title: Business Location & Geofencing
settings.geolocation.description: Set your business's location for staff clock-in verification
settings.geolocation.geofence_monitoring: Require team members to be within your geolocked zone before clocking in.
settings.geolocation.quick_setup_desc: Get your exact current location with one click
settings.geolocation.staff_clock_in_with: Staff must clock in within {{km}} km of the map marker.
profile.language_hint: Used for staff notifications and Miya responses. If not set, the business language is used.
profile.change_password_desc: Leave blank to keep current password
profile.updated_success_desc: Your personal information has been saved.
profile.updated_password_desc: Your password and profile have been updated.
rbac.title: Role permissions
rbac.subtitle: Control what each role can see and do across the app.
rbac.badge.custom: Custom permissions saved for this role.
rbac.bucket.apps.help: Top-level areas visible in the dashboard and navigation.
rbac.bucket.widgets.help: Built-in dashboard widgets this role can add to their dashboard.
rbac.bucket.actions.help: Sensitive operations — approve / edit / delete — this role can perform.
rbac.scope.label: Assign to
rbac.users.search_placeholder: Search by name, email or role…
rbac.users.select_hint: Select one or more users to override their permissions.
rbac.users.none_available: No assignable users in this workspace.
rbac.users.none_selected: Select a user to start editing.
rbac.users.starting_from_role: Starting from {{role}} defaults — your changes will override them for the selected user(s).
rbac.users.multiple_selected_hint: Saving will apply the same permissions to all {{count}} selected users.
rbac.users.reset_confirm: Remove the saved override for {{count}} user(s)? They will fall back to their role's permissions.
settings.locations.title: Business Locations
settings.locations.description: Manage each site where your team works. Staff can clock in from any active location.
settings.locations.add_description: Give this branch a name. You'll pin its coordinates and geofence on the next screen.
settings.locations.add_success: Location created. Now set its coordinates and radius below.
settings.locations.primary_hint: {{name}} is currently your primary branch. Staff and reports default to it. You have {{count}} active locations — any of them will accept clock-ins.
settings.locations.delete_warning: Staff will no longer be able to clock in at this location. This cannot be undone.
settings.locations.delete_primary_warnin: This is your primary location. Another active location will be promoted to primary automatically.
settings.locations.empty_description: Add your first site to enable staff clock-in verification. Chains can add more branches later.
onboarding.gate.owner_only: Only the restaurant owner can complete initial setup. Ask them to finish the onboarding wizard.
onboarding.welcome.title: Hello {{name}}, welcome to Mizan AI
onboarding.welcome.subtitle: Let's get {{restaurant}} set up in about 2 minutes — you can skip anything you want.
onboarding.welcome.b1_desc: A CSV of staff or collaborators — we'll invite them on WhatsApp.
onboarding.welcome.b2_desc: Choose the dashboard cards you care about most.
onboarding.welcome.b3_desc: Decide which roles can see each widget.
onboarding.welcome.b4_desc: Tell Miya who handles each type of issue or request.
onboarding.staff.title: Upload your staff
onboarding.staff.subtitle: Drop a CSV of your team. We'll send each person a WhatsApp to activate their account — no app install needed.
onboarding.staff.dropzone_title: Drop CSV here or click to browse
onboarding.staff.dropzone_hint: Columns: First Name, Last Name, WhatsApp, Role (Email is optional).
onboarding.staff.template_hint: Not sure how to format your file? Grab our ready-made template.
onboarding.staff.template_err: Couldn't download the template. Please try again.
onboarding.staff.saved: Invited {{count}} staff — they'll get a WhatsApp.
onboarding.widgets.title: What do you want on your dashboard?
onboarding.widgets.subtitle: Pick the cards that matter. You can always add more later from the dashboard.
onboarding.perms.title: Who can see each widget?
onboarding.perms.subtitle: Choose which roles have access to each card. You can change this anytime in Settings → Permissions.
onboarding.owners.title: Who owns what?
onboarding.owners.subtitle: Pick a default person for each category — Miya routes incidents, requests, and tasks to them automatically.
onboarding.owners.no_staff: No staff yet — upload a CSV in step 1 and come back.
onboarding.gcal.title: Connect Google Calendar
onboarding.gcal.subtitle: Optional. Sync shifts and reservations both ways — or skip and add it later.
onboarding.gcal.card_title: Two-way sync, whenever you want it
onboarding.gcal.card_desc: Shifts show up on your Google Calendar, meetings flow into Mizan. You can enable this later from Settings.
onboarding.gcal.not_configured: Google Calendar isn't enabled on this server yet. Ask support to set it up — you can skip for now.
onboarding.gcal.error: Google Calendar connect failed. Try again or skip for now.
onboarding.done.title: Enjoy Mizan!
onboarding.done.subtitle: {{restaurant}} is ready. Miya is listening on WhatsApp and your dashboard is live.
onboarding.err.save_widgets: Could not save your widget selection.
billing.current_plan_desc: Manage your subscription, payment method, and invoices.
billing.plans_desc: Start small, grow at your pace. Switch or cancel anytime — prorated automatically.
billing.pilot_blurb: You're on pilot access with full platform features. Choose a plan below to lock in your pricing.
billing.load_error: We couldn't load the plans. Please try again.
billing.no_plans: No plans are available right now. Please check back soon.
billing.footnote: Prices shown exclude local VAT where applicable. Paid plans include secure payments via Stripe.
